case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LEMMING, JOHN T. JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $420.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LEMMING, JOHN T. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEMMING, JOHN T. JR. $420.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $475.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-14-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-14-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
